name: Boolean shape operations
description: Adds a Shaping panel to the vector costume editor: Unite · Subtract · Intersect · Combine/Release · Expand

info.text: Unite — merge all selected shapes into one filled shape
Subtract — front shape cuts a hole in every selected shape below it (Shift: cuts back shape only; Alt: keeps the cutter)
Intersect — keep only the overlapping areas of selected shapes (Alt: divide all into distinct regions)
Combine / Release — Combine groups shapes into a compound path where overlaps become transparent holes; Release splits it back into separate shapes
Expand — grow a shape by its outline width

settings.name: Fix modifier keys getting stuck after Alt+Tab
Fix duplicate shapes when Alt-dragging combined paths
